partsUsed: Leaves, seeds (traditionally employed botanical drug part)
habitat: East Asia; culinary herb in Japan, Korea, Vietnam, China.
traditionalUsesEn: Culinary herb (sushi garnish, kimchi, oils); traditional East Asian medicinal food uses vary by cultivar.
traditionalUsesDe: Ostasiatisches Würz- und Blattgemüse; traditionell in der chinesischen und japanischen Küche und Volksmedizin.
activeCompounds: Essential oil (perillaldehyde chemotypes), rosmarinic acid, anthocyanins (red forms)
preparation: Fresh leaves; seed oil; pickled leaves.
cautions: Rare pulmonary issues linked to long high intake of seed oil in animals—normal culinary use typical.
historicalNotes: Red and green chemotypes shape regional cuisines.
habitatDe: East Asia; kulinarisch Kraut in Japan, Korea, Vietnam, China.
preparationDe: Frischblätter in der Küche; Samenöl; getrocknetes Kraut nach Tradition.
cautionsDe: Rare pulmonary issues linked zu lang hoch intake von Samen Öl in animals—normal kulinarische Verwendung typical.
historicalNotesDe: Rote und grüne Chemotypen prägen regionale Küchen Ostasiens.
